name: Kentico Xperience DXP and Headless CMS API
what_it_does: Digital Experience Platform (DXP) and headless CMS with REST and GraphQL API — enabling marketing and development teams to manage content, personalize experiences, automate email campaigns, and track visitor journeys in a unified platform, with .NET-based CMS for on-premises/cloud deployment and a headless Kontent.ai SaaS offering for decoupled architectures.
use_cases: Delivering personalized website content via Kentico Xperience API for headless frontend integration
Managing content types and pages via Kentico Management API for content migration automation
Integrating Kentico contact profiles and segments with marketing tools via API for CDP use
Triggering Kentico email campaign sends via API for marketing automation workflows
Querying Kentico analytics and visitor behavior data via API for personalization decisions
not_for: Small teams needing simple website CMS (Kentico is enterprise DXP with complex setup)
Pure headless CMS without marketing features (use Contentful or Directus for simpler headless)
Non-.NET organizations (Kentico Xperience requires .NET expertise for on-premises deployment)
best_when: An enterprise with .NET development team needs a unified DXP combining content management, marketing automation, personalization, and analytics — especially in regulated industries (healthcare, financial services, government) needing on-premises deployment.
avoid_when: You don't have .NET developers, need a simple headless CMS, prefer SaaS-only, or are a small team without dedicated CMS administrators.

auth.notes: API key for Delivery API (content access). OAuth2 client credentials for Management API (content mutations). Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped with role-based access. Webhook for content publish and unpublish events. REST Delivery API for content retrieval. GraphQL Delivery API available. Management REST API for content creation. .NET SDK (primary), JavaScript SDK, PHP SDK. SAML SSO for enterprise identity.

pricing.notes: Czech company (Brno). Founded 2004. Bootstrapped and profitable. Ranked consistently in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Platforms. 35,000+ customers across 100 countries. Kentico Xperience (formerly EMS) is the flagship .NET DXP. Kontent.ai is a separately branded SaaS headless CMS (spun off 2021). Strong in Central and Eastern Europe. Used by La Trobe University, Bridgestone, Zurich Insurance. Czech engineering culture with strong security focus. Partner ecosystem of 250+ agencies.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST Delivery API + GraphQL for content retrieval. OAuth2 + API key auth. Good documentation with .NET, JavaScript, PHP SDK examples. Webhook for content events. Delivery API rate limit 1,000 req/min. Self-hosted option for full infrastructure control. Czech company with GDPR-first design. Annual contract required. .NET developer expertise needed for Xperience deployment.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Content queries fully idempotent. Page reads idempotent. Management API mutations require unique code names for idempotency. Webhook delivery with retry on failure.
known_agent_gotchas: .NET developer required for Kentico Xperience deployment — not a pure SaaS CMS
Annual contract required — significant commitment before API integration
Kentico Xperience vs. Kontent.ai are separate products — verify which is being implemented
GraphQL API available but Delivery REST API is more mature and documented
Self-hosted option requires .NET infrastructure management and Windows/Linux server

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA compliant. Multi-region and self-hosted data residency options. OAuth2 + API key auth. Czech company with privacy-first culture. HIPAA BAA for healthcare deployments. Self-hosted eliminates cloud data residency concerns. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. Content data may include personalization profiles — strict access controls required. Annual security audit documentation available for enterprise customers.
